author: garyrong
misilva73
content:
Hi all! I am starting to clean up the repricing EIPs. But before finishing it, I wanted to understand what to do with https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11891

Should we merge this before, <@830368514225340436> and <@402853454126776320> ?

author: gurukamath
content: Yup. I think this PR has some good clarifications that are helpful to implementers

author: misilva73
content: <@402853454126776320> , now that we are processing 7702 authorizations in the pre-execution phase, as described in 2780, can I remove all that counter logic described in 8037 (the Gas accounting for EIP-7702 authorizations section)?

author: misilva73
content: [Here](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11906) is the PR with the EIP clean-ups. Should be merged shortly
